name: Specific Tax Source Direction Election

eligibility.description: Requires specific reference to the GST tax in the governing instrument to override the default rule that the tax is charged to the transferred property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can use a governing instrument (will or trust) to specifically direct that GST tax be paid from a different source rather than being charged against the transferred property itself.
